name: classifier
summary: Second hop of the loop: signal -> { type, intent, confidence, target }. Rules-based + deterministic today; same contract for an LLM-backed classifier later. Honesty rule: unmatched -> explicit 'unknown', never a fabricated target.

admission.note: Candidate. NOT in harness/manifest.json and NOT admitted. Promotion is a human step.

exit: Returns a classification with an explicit confidence and target (possibly 'unknown').
invariants: Every signal gets a classification — never silently dropped.
An unmatched signal yields type/target 'unknown' at low confidence — no fabricated target.
Deterministic: identical input yields identical output (until an LLM path is opted in).
Confidence is one of high|medium|low (architecture confidence routing).
